title: agauria buxifolia
intro: Agauria buxifolia, also known as the boxleaf agauria or boxwood agauria, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agauria buxifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
